scripts.dev: concurrently -n "PUBLIC,BACKOFFICE" -c "bgGreen.bold,bgBlue.bold" "npm run dev --prefix frontpublic" "npm run dev --prefix \"nextfront backoffice\""
scripts.build: concurrently "npm run build --prefix frontpublic" "npm run build --prefix \"nextfront backoffice\""
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontpublic && npm install --prefix \"nextfront backoffice\"
